BurstAgility.name: Deathrite【Haste】
BurstAgility.desc:
Base Stack: 3
When getting Rupture triggered by getting hit by an Attack Skill from a target with 10+ Speed, lose 1 Stack and gain +1 Rupture Count
At 0 Stack, take Gluttony damage equal to Rupture Potency on self; then, this effect expires
※ Cannot gain additional Stacks of this effect while it is already active

LegStrength.name: Strider【Mao】
LegStrength.desc:
Max Stack: 3
Turn End: gain 5 Haste next turn
Reduced by 1 at Turn End

BloodDinner_Common_Accumulation.name: Bloodfeast Consumed (shared)
BloodDinner_Common_Accumulation.desc: Total Bloodfeast consumed in this Encounter

OutisNoHat.name: Violent Collections
OutisNoHat.desc:
- If this unit has Haste, gain +1 more Tremor Count from its Base Skills
- If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, deal +(Speed difference x 3)% damage (max 15%)

FusionVibration.name: Amplitude Entanglement
FusionVibration.desc:
- Fuses the effects of the Tremor type added by Amplitude Entanglement and the Tremor type currently on target together under Tremor - Superposition.
- Potency and Count values do not change over Entanglement.
- When triggering Amplitude Conversion on Tremor - Superposition, it activates as Amplitude Entanglement instead.
- Turn End: converted into base Tremor.

ParryingResultUp.name: Clash Power Up
ParryingResultUp.desc: In a Clash, gain Clash Power equal to the value

VibrationIgnition.name: Tremor - Scorch
VibrationIgnition.desc:
- On Tremor Burst, take Wrath Damage equal to (sum of Tremor Potency and Burn Potency / 2), and lose 1 Burn Count
- When hit by Skills that trigger Tremor Burst, raise this unit's Stagger Threshold by the effect's Potency
- Turn End: reduce the Count by 1
(Interacts the same way as normal Tremor does to effects that raise or reduce Tremor Potency/Count)

GazeReplica.name: Gaze
GazeReplica.desc:
- Max Stack: 7
- Take and deal +10% damage from and against Jia Huan
- At 7 Stack, converts to Contempt

IndexPrescriptDon_0.name: Prescript: [Device] I
IndexPrescriptDon_0.desc:
Use a Skill marked with Mark of the Prescript or hit a target with a marked Skill.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect when this unit has no Unlock
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 3

IndexPrescriptDon_1.name: Prescript: [Device] II
IndexPrescriptDon_1.desc:
Hit a target with a Skill marked with Mark of the Prescript.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect if this unit has Unlock - I
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 6

IndexPrescriptDon_2.name: Prescript: [Device] III
IndexPrescriptDon_2.desc:
Hit a target with E.G.O Awakening Skill, or, in Effloresced E.G.O::Procuration state, 'Skill 3' marked with Mark of the Prescript.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect if this unit has Unlock - II
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 9

IndexPrescriptDon_3.name: Prescript: [Device] IV
IndexPrescriptDon_3.desc:
Eliminate all enemies before the next Prescript arrives.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect if this unit has Unlock - III

UnlockBuff_Base.name: Unlock
UnlockBuff_Base.desc:
- Gain this effect when over certain Grace of the Prescript Stack
- Effect stage increases based on Grace of the Prescript Stack
- Max: Stage 3

UnlockBuffAlly_1.name: Unlock - I
UnlockBuffAlly_1.desc:
- Defense Level +1
- Combat End: Heal 5 SP

UnlockBuffAlly_2.name: Unlock - II
UnlockBuffAlly_2.desc:
- Defense Level +2
- Combat End: Heal 10 SP

UnlockBuffAlly_3.name: Unlock - III
UnlockBuffAlly_3.desc:
- Defense Level +3
- Combat End: Heal 15 SP

Blandishment.name: Faith Beyond Question
Blandishment.desc:
- Min & Max Speed +1
- Offense Level +2, Defense Level +2
- Gain 1 more Poise Potency from Base Skills
- This unit's SP does not drop below -15 from SP loss effects on this unit's Base Attack Skills
- Max Stack: 1

Blandishment_Shin.name: Shin (心) - Procuration
Blandishment_Shin.desc:
- Min & Max Speed +2
- Offense Level +1, Defense Level +1
- Gain 1 more Poise Potency and Poise Count from Base Skills
- Deal +(missing HP percentage / 2)% damage with Base Skills (max 40%)
- Max Stack: 1

CriticalDamageUp.name: Crit DMG Up
CriticalDamageUp.desc: For this turn: Deal +10% damage on Critical Hit for every Stack

IndexPrescriptTargetMarkToEnemy.name: Mark of the Prescript
IndexPrescriptTargetMarkToEnemy.desc: - Apply Mark of the Prescript to a Base Attack Skill on this unit's Dashboard

IndexPrescriptTargetToEnemy.name: The Prescript's Target
IndexPrescriptTargetToEnemy.desc:
- Take +10% damage from The Index units
- This effect is applied to a single target every turn regardless of the number of The Index units deployed

BlessingOfIndexPrescriptAlly.name: Grace of the Prescript
BlessingOfIndexPrescriptAlly.desc:
- Offense Level +1 for every 3 Stacks
- Max Stack: 9

IndexPrescriptFaust_0.name: Prescript: [Paper Slip] I
IndexPrescriptFaust_0.desc:
Use a Skill marked with Mark of the Prescript or hit a target with a marked Skill.

- Turn Start: At 0~2 Grace of the Prescript, gain this effect 
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 3

IndexPrescriptFaust_1.name: Prescript: [Paper Slip] II
IndexPrescriptFaust_1.desc:
Hit a target with a Skill marked with Mark of the Prescript.

- Turn Start: At 3~5 Grace of the Prescript, gain this effect
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 6

IndexPrescriptFaust_2.name: Prescript: [Paper Slip] III
IndexPrescriptFaust_2.desc:
Hit a target with E.G.O Awakening Skill or 'Skill 3' marked with Mark of the Prescript.

- Turn Start: At 6~8 Grace of the Prescript, gain this effect
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 9

IndexPrescriptFaust_3.name: Prescript: [Paper Slip] IV
IndexPrescriptFaust_3.desc:
Eliminate all enemies before the next Prescript arrives.

- Turn Start: At 9 Grace of the Prescript, gain this effect

KarmaOfIndexAlly.name: Karmic Consequence
KarmaOfIndexAlly.desc:
- Turn Start:
· Gain 1 Defense Level Down for every 10 Stacks
· Gain 1 Fragile for every 20 Stacks
- Max Stack: 100

RedEyeFirst.name: Red Eyes
RedEyeFirst.desc:
- Base Skill Coin effects inflict +1 more Bleed
- Max Value : 20
- Unique Charge (fixed Potency)
- Resource used by certain Skills for additional effects
- Enhances the buff based on Value
· Stage 1 (1~7) : Red Eyes
· Stage 2 (8~15) : Red Eyes - Alert
· Stage 3 (16~20) : Red Eyes - Devouring
- The amount of additional bleed inflicted by the first line of this buff is equal to the buff enhancement Stage (max 3)

PenanceFirst.name: Penitence
PenanceFirst.desc:
- Heal 2 SP On Hit with Base Skill Coins that gain Penitence
- Max Value : 20
- Unique Charge (fixed Potency)
- Turn Start: gain (Penitence)% of max HP as Shield
- Resource used by certain Skills for additional effects
- Enhances the buff Stage based on Value
· Stage 1 (1~7) : Penitence
· Stage 2 (8~15) : Penitence - Periphery
· Stage 3 (16~20) : Penitence - Confession
- The amount of SP healed by the first line of this buff is based on the enhancement Stage (enhancement Stage x 2)

Emptiness.name: Only Ashes Remain
Emptiness.desc:
- Cannot maintain Red Eyes & Penitence
- When gaining Red Eyes with Base Skill effects, heal self and 1 ally with the lowest HP percentage by (Red Eyes gained)% of this unit's max HP (2 times per turn)
- When gaining Penitence with Base Skill effects, heal self and 1 ally with the least SP by ((Penitence gained)/2) SP (2 times per turn)
- Turn End: this effect expires

SinkingWhite.name: Butterfly
SinkingWhite.desc:
- Unique Sinking
- Base Value: 0, Max Value: 15
- The Potency and the Count of this effect are called "The Living" and "The Departed", respectively.
- When hit, the attacker heals (The Living/4) SP. (min 1; rounded down)
- When hit, and if this unit's SP is at less than 0, take (Sinking Potency/5) Gloom damage for every value of The Departed. (max Gloom damage 30; rounded down; deals half damage to targets without SP.)
- Turn End: Reset The Departed of this effect to 0; then, gain Sinking equal to The Living and convert The Living into The Departed.
- No external effects can raise the amount of Butterfly inflicted. "Inflict additional Sinking" effects inflict additional Sinking instead of additional Butterfly.
- This effect expires when both The Living and The Departed reach 0.

BulletLament.name: The Living & The Departed
BulletLament.desc:
- Unique Ammo
- The sum of Potency and Count maxes out at 20.
- Consumed for certain Skills.
- Whether The Living(Potency) or The Departed(Count) will be consumed for each shot is randomly determined
- Some attacks cancel if this unit runs out of ammo.

ReloadLament.name: Reload
ReloadLament.desc:
- Effect applied to The Living & The Departed(Unique Ammo)
- Consume (30 - (The Living + The Departed))/2 SP. (rounded down)
- Reset both The Living and The Departed values on self to 0, and gain the max value of their sum based on the probabilities listed in the Passive 'ISeeTheDyingButterfly.'
- On Reload, gain at least 1 of The Living and The Departed.

Enhancement.name: Attack Power Up
Enhancement.desc: Attack skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

Agility.name: Haste
Agility.desc: Speed increases by the effect’s Count for one turn.

Endurance.name: Defense Power Up
Endurance.desc: Defense skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

Reduction.name: Attack Power Down
Reduction.desc: Attack skills lose final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

Binding.name: Bind
Binding.desc: Speed decreases by the effect’s Count for one turn.

Vulnerable.name: Fragile
Vulnerable.desc: Take more damage from skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

Charge.name: Charge
Charge.desc: Resource used by certain skills for additional effects. Its Count can go up to 20. Count lowers by 1 at the end of each turn.

ResultEnhancement.name: Power Up
ResultEnhancement.desc: Skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

Protection.name: Protection
Protection.desc: Take less damage from skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

AttackDmgUp.name: Damage Up
AttackDmgUp.desc: Deal more damage with skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

DefenseUp.name: Defense Level Up
DefenseUp.desc: Defense Level increases based on the effect's Potency for one turn.

PlusCoinValueUp.name: Plus Coin Boost
PlusCoinValueUp.desc: Raise the Power of Plus Coins by the effect’s Count.

Disarming.name: Defense Power Down
Disarming.desc: Defense skills lose final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

AttackDmgDown.name: Damage Down
AttackDmgDown.desc: Deal less damage with skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

DefenseDown.name: Defense Level Down
DefenseDown.desc: Defense Level decreases based on the effect's Potency for one turn.

Paralysis.name: Paralyze
Paralysis.desc: Fix the Power of Coins to 0 for one turn, with one Coin per the effect’s Count.

PlusCoinValueDown.name: Plus Coin Drop
PlusCoinValueDown.desc: Reduce the power of Plus Coins by the effect’s Count.

Combustion.name: Burn
Combustion.desc:
At the end of the turn, take fixed damage by the effect’s Potency.
Then, reduce its Count by 1.

Laceration.name: Bleed
Laceration.desc:
When tossing an attack Coin, take fixed damage by the effect’s Potency.
Then, reduce its Count by 1.

Vibration.name: Tremor
Vibration.desc:
When attacked by skills that trigger Tremor Burst, raise the Stagger Threshold by the effect’s Potency.
At the end of the turn, reduce the Count by 1.

Burst.name: Rupture
Burst.desc:
When hit by an attack, take fixed damage by the effect’s Potency.
Then, reduce its Count by 1.

Sinking.name: Sinking
Sinking.desc:
When hit by an attack, take fixed SP damage by the effect’s Potency.
(Units with no Sanity take Gloom damage instead.)
Then, reduce its Count by 1.

Breath.name: Poise
Breath.desc:
On hit, gain a Potency-based chance to deal critical damage, reducing the Count by 1 if successful.
At the end of the turn, reduce the Count by 1.

AttackUp.name: Offense Level Up
AttackUp.desc: Offense level increases based on the effect's Potency for one turn.

AttackDown.name: Offense Level Down
AttackDown.desc: Offense level decreases based on the effect's Potency for one turn.

SlashDamageUp.name: Slash DMG Up
SlashDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Slash skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

PenetrateDamageUp.name: Pierce DMG Up
PenetrateDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Pierce skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

HitDamageUp.name: Blunt DMG Up
HitDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Blunt skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

SlashResistDown.name: Slash Resist Down
SlashResistDown.desc:
Increase Slash Resistance based on Stack.
(0.1 per Stack)

PenetrateResistDown.name: Pierce Resist Down
PenetrateResistDown.desc:
Increase Pierce Resistance based on Stack.
(0.1 per Stack)

AzureResistDown.name: Gloom Resist Down
AzureResistDown.desc:
Increase Gloom Resistance based on Stack.
(0.1 per Stack)

CrimsonDamageUp.name: Wrath DMG Up
CrimsonDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Wrath skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

ShamrockDamageUp.name: Gluttony DMG Up
ShamrockDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Gluttony skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

AzureDamageUp.name: Gloom DMG Up
AzureDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Gloom skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

VioletDamageUp.name: Envy DMG Up
VioletDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Envy skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

Bullet.name: Ammo
Bullet.desc:
Spent by certain skills.
Some attacks cancel if lacking Ammo.

Assemble.name: Fanatic
Assemble.desc: Raise Skill Final Power by the effect’s Count against units with Nails for the turn. (Applies to clashes as well)

SlashTakeDamageDown.name: Slash Protection
SlashTakeDamageDown.desc: Take less damage from Slash skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

SlashTakeDamageUp.name: Slash Fragility
SlashTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Slash skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

PenetrateTakeDamageUp.name: Pierce Fragility
PenetrateTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Pierce skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

HitTakeDamageUp.name: Blunt Fragility
HitTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Blunt skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

ScarletTakeDamageUp.name: Lust Fragility
ScarletTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Lust skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

AzureTakeDamageUp.name: Gloom Fragility
AzureTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Gloom skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

VioletTakeDamageUp.name: Envy Fragility
VioletTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Envy skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

NailPersonality.name: Nails
NailPersonality.desc:
Unique Bleed
Turn Start: Gain 1 Bleed and increase the Bleed Count by this effect’s Count.
Turn End: Halve the Count. (Rounded down)

MarkOfHeresy.name: Gaze
MarkOfHeresy.desc:
Take +20% damage from Pierce and Blunt skills for one turn.
The ally that defeats the marked unit heals 10 SP; if the ally is an 'N Corp. Fanatic', also apply 1 Fanatic next turn.

HitResultUp.name: Blunt Power Up
HitResultUp.desc: Blunt skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

WeaknessAnalysis.name: Weakness Analyzed
WeaknessAnalysis.desc: A random “Endure” or “Normal” attack type resistance is weakened [+0.2 to damage multiplier] for one turn.

VioletResultUp.name: Envy Power Up
VioletResultUp.desc: Envy skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

TakeHpHealReduce.name: HP Healing Down
TakeHpHealReduce.desc: HP healed by Passives, Skill effects, or Coin effects decreases proportionally to the value of this effect. (Max 5)

Thirst.name: Appetite
Thirst.desc:
Increases the healing provided by the Passive [Rustle Up].
Spent when the Passive activates.

DimensionRift.name: Dimensional Rift
DimensionRift.desc: At the end of the turn, gain Rupture Count by this effect’s amount. Then, remove this effect.

SinkingSurge.name: Sinking Deluge
SinkingSurge.desc:
Deal SP damage by (Sinking Count * Sinking Potency), then remove Sinking
If target's SP is -45 or lower, the excess SP damage is dealt as Gloom-affinity HP damage
(Units with no Sanity take all of it as Gloom HP damage)

KCorpSerum.name: K Corp Ampule
KCorpSerum.desc:
Turn Start: At less than 4 Count, heal by (Count * 5)% of Max HP
At 4+ Count, the unit dies

Talisman.name: Talisman
Talisman.desc:
Max Stack: 6
On Hit, consume 1 Rupture Count on target to inflict (Stack / 2) Rupture (inflicts at least 1 Rupture if Rupture Count was consumed; rounded down)
When hit, gain (Stack / 2) Rupture and lose 1 Stack (gain at least 1 Rupture; rounded down)
Turn End: at 6+ Stack, remove all Talisman on self and take fixed damage by Stack

Aggro.name: Aggro
Aggro.desc: In focused encounters, slots with higher Aggro values are more likely to be targeted by enemies.

BurstProtection.name: Rupture Protection
BurstProtection.desc: Take -1 damage per Count from Rupture effects for one turn.

ChargeForceField.name: Charge Barrier
ChargeForceField.desc:
- Gain (Charge Barrier # x 3) Shield.
- Lose 1 Charge Barrier after losing (Charge Barrier # x 3) Shield.
- (If the unit is a W Corp. employee, ALL Charge Barrier effects activate at (Charge Barrier # x 5) instead of at (Charge Barrier # x 3))
- Turn End: Gain a Charge Count for each Charge Barrier #, and Charge Barrier and Shield gained from Charge Barrier expire completely next turn

SlashResultUp.name: Slash Power Up
SlashResultUp.desc: Slash skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

Discard.name: Discard
Discard.desc:
- Delete Skills that fit the condition and are selectable during the Chaining Phase from the Dashboard. (Defensive & E.G.O Skills do not count. Does not delete the Skill from the upcoming Skills list)
- Discarded Skills will not activate Skill effects or Coin effects other than effects from Discard, and will not give E.G.O resources.

KnowledgeExplored.name: Insight
KnowledgeExplored.desc: The rank of the last Skill Discarded by the unit with this effect (Base Value: 1)

Unjust_Enrichment.name: Unjust Enrichment
Unjust_Enrichment.desc:
- Gained on Heads Hit against target with Bleed (Max 4)
- When 'Bullets are Pricey' Passive activates, consume all Unjust Enrichment stack to deal bonus damage

RetaliationBook.name: Vengeance Mark
RetaliationBook.desc: Applied to the unit that dealt the most damage to an ally (Max 1)

PenetrateResultUp.name: Pierce Power Up
PenetrateResultUp.desc: Pierce skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

DuelDeclaration_DonQuixote.name: Declared Duel - Don Quixote
DuelDeclaration_DonQuixote.desc:
- In a Clash between the unit that inflicted Declared Duel and the unit with the status, the declarer has +1 Clash Power. On Hit, the declarer gains 1 Haste next turn. (4 times per turn)
- Expires when the unit inflicts Declared Duel on a different target. Replaced when other unit inflicts Declared Duel on the same target.

DuelDeclaration_Outis.name: Declared Duel - Outis
DuelDeclaration_Outis.desc:
- In a Clash between the unit that inflicted Declared Duel and the unit with the status, the declarer has +1 Clash Power. On Hit, the declarer gains 1 Haste next turn. (4 times per turn)
- Expires when the unit inflicts Declared Duel on a different target. Replaced when other unit inflicts Declared Duel on the same target.

DuelDeclaration_Sinclair.name: Declared Duel - Sinclair
DuelDeclaration_Sinclair.desc:
- In a Clash between the unit that inflicted Declared Duel and the unit with the status, the declarer has +1 Clash Power. On Hit, the declarer gains 1 Haste next turn. (4 times per turn)
- Expires when the unit inflicts Declared Duel on a different target. Replaced when another unit inflicts Declared Duel on the same target.

VibrationExplosion.name: Tremor Burst
VibrationExplosion.desc: Raise target's Stagger Threshold by Tremor Potency on target

OneOnOneDuel.name: Single Combat
OneOnOneDuel.desc: Established when the attacked Slot is targeted by a single unit, and only by that single unit. This condition is established only between the attacking unit and the attacked Slot. (Does not apply to reused Skills)

FreischutzShotCount.name: Magic Bullet
FreischutzShotCount.desc:
- Max: 7
- Value changes depending on certain Skill effects.
- [Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis Only]
· The higher the value, the higher the Base Power and Coin Power of Skill 3

DarkFlame.name: Dark Flame
DarkFlame.desc:
- Unique Burn
- Max Value: 7
- Target loses Defense Level equal to the value of this effect
- Turn End: Deal (Value x Burn on target) Pride Affinity damage, then expires

HeatedGasHarpoon.name: Heated Gas Harpoon
HeatedGasHarpoon.desc: For 1 turn, inflict 1 Burn with Heads Hit

OverHeatedGasHarpoon.name: Overheated Gas Harpoon
OverHeatedGasHarpoon.desc: For 1 turn, inflict 1 Burn On Hit

CoverAttack.name: Assist Attack
CoverAttack.desc:
- If unit A applies this effect to unit B: Unit B follows up with an Unopposed Attack with its Skill 1 against the same enemy Unit A attacked with its Skill. Activates at Unit A's Attack End.
- The Skill used as an Assist Attack does not affect Unit B's upcoming Skills list.

IndigoResultUp.name: Pride Power Up
IndigoResultUp.desc: Pride Skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

BladeResultUpTier1.name: Sword of the Homeland - Rending
BladeResultUpTier1.desc: Skill 1 gains Final Power by the effect’s Count for this turn.

BladeResultUpTier2.name: Sword of the Homeland - Penetrating
BladeResultUpTier2.desc: Skill 2 gains Final Power by the effect’s Count for this turn.

SwordPlayOfTheHomeland.name: Swordplay of the Homeland
SwordPlayOfTheHomeland.desc:
- When at 5+ Poise, upon Skill use, Skill 1 and Skill 2 gain Coin Power +(3/# of Coins, minimum 1) and deal +(30/# of Coins)% damage on Critical Hit
- When at 7+ Poise, upon Skill use, Skill 3 deals +(30/# of Coins)% damage and deals +(50/# of Coins)% damage on Critical Hit

RedApricotBlossom.name: Red Plum Blossom
RedApricotBlossom.desc:
- Unique Bleed
- Max value: 10
- +10% chance for this unit to be Critically Hit if this unit is the main target
- When struck by a Critical Hit, gain Bleed equal to the half of the value and take +(value x 3)% damage on Critical Hit
- Reduce value by 1 when hit

VibrationCollapse.name: Tremor - Decay
VibrationCollapse.desc:
Lose 1 Defense Level for every 4 Tremor Potency on self
When Hit by Skills that trigger Tremor Burst, raise the Stagger Threshold by the effect's Potency
Turn End: reduce the Count by 1
(Interacts the same way as normal Tremor does to effects that raises or reduces Tremor Potency/Count)

EchoOfMansion.name: Echoes of the Manor
EchoOfMansion.desc:
- 50% chance to gain +1 Sinking Count when gaining Sinking Potency or Count from Skill or Coin effects
- Units with SP: Change Panic Type to Echoes of the Manor. When this unit Panics, inflict 2 Echoes of the Manor to 2 random other allies of this unit next turn
- Units without SP: -10% chance to flip Heads
- Reduced by 1 at Turn End
This effect is not cumulative; inflicting it will replace the current value with the inflicted value.
※ Apply the "Units without SP" conditional to certain enemies that have SP but can't change their Panic Types.

Switch_Vibration.name: Amplitude Conversion
Switch_Vibration.desc:
Converts Tremor or already converted Tremor on target to a different type of Tremor.
Potency and Count values do not change over the conversion.

MarkOfButler.name: B.M.
MarkOfButler.desc:
Enhances Edgar Family Chief Butler Ryōshū Skills against targets with this effect.
Turn End: reduce the Count by 1

UnstableFeeling.name: Volatile Passion
UnstableFeeling.desc:
- On Hit, inflict 1 Burn
- If the main target has Burn, Final Power +1
- When hit, if this unit had a Defense Skill chained at Combat Start, inflict Burn against the attacker for the turn
- Turn End: lose (# of turns spent in Volatile E.G.O state x 5) SP. (Max SP loss : 40)

VibrationEcho.name: Tremor - Reverb
VibrationEcho.desc:
- On Tremor Burst, take Sloth damage equal to Tremor Potency on self.
- When hit by Skills that trigger Tremor Burst, raise the Stagger Threshold by the effect's Potency.
- Turn End: reduce the Count by 1.
(Interacts the same way as normal Tremor does to effects that raise or reduce Tremor Potency/Count)

TimeSuspend.name: Time Moratorium
TimeSuspend.desc:
- Does not take any damage as long as this effect is active; store all damage received instead
- Combat End: If there is only 1 Count left of this effect, the effect triggers Tremor Burst after dealing (100 + (Stack x 15)% of stored damage as Sloth damage
- Turn End: gain 1 Stack and lose 1 Count
- The Time Moratorium will immediately expire after triggering the Tremor Burst and the Sloth damage effect if another instance of Time Moratorium is inflicted on a unit with Time Moratorium.

TimeRentalTwoPersonality.name: Borrowed Time
TimeRentalTwoPersonality.desc:
Turn End at 2+ Count:
- Gain (Borrowed Time Count - 1) Haste, Clash Power Up, and Fragile next turn
- If this unit is set to gain more Bind than Haste next turn, the Borrowed Time effect expires at the next Turn Start, and this unit gets Staggered

Turn End: At 1 Count, gain 2(Borrowed Time Stack - 1) Bind next turn
Turn End: Gain 1 Stack, lose 1 Count

VibrationChainPersonality.name: Tremor - Chain
VibrationChainPersonality.desc:
- Lose 1 Clash Power for every 10 Tremor Potency on self (max 3)
- When Hit by Skills that trigger Tremor Burst, raise the Stagger Threshold by the effect's Potency
- Turn End: reduce the Count by 1
- (Interacts the same way as normal Tremor does to effects that raise or reduce Tremor Potency/Count)

GazePersonality.name: Gaze of Contempt
GazePersonality.desc:
- Max Value: 7
- Deal +7% damage for every Gaze of Contempt
- Turn End: this effect expires
- Turn End: At 7 Gaze of Contempt value, convert it to Contempt of the Gaze next turn instead of expiring

[Contempt of the Gaze]
- Gain 7 Protection
- Gain 7 Damage Down
- One of this unit's Slots gains +20 Aggro
- Cannot gain Gaze of Contempt as long as Contempt of the Gaze is active
- Turn End: this effect expires

ContemptPersonality.name: Contempt of the Gaze
ContemptPersonality.desc:
- Gain 7 Protection
- Gain 7 Damage Down
- One of this unit's Skill Slots gains +20 Aggro
- Cannot gain Gaze of Contempt as long as Contempt of the Gaze is active
- Turn End: this effect expires

KnowledgeTraining.name: Erudition
KnowledgeTraining.desc:
- Max Value: 6
- When Discarding a Skill, gain (Erudition x 1.5)% of this unit's max HP as Shield (once per turn)
- If this unit Discards a Skill at 2+ Insight, gain 1 Clash Power (once per turn)
- Reduced by 1 when taking HP damage after getting hit by an enemy's Attack Skill
- Expires when Staggered

BoseProjektil.name: Torn Memory
BoseProjektil.desc:
- Max Value : 7
- Used for certain Skills

ChargeLoad.name: Load
ChargeLoad.desc:
- Max Value : 6
- Attack Skills that consumed Charge Count deal +2.5% damage for every value on self (max 15%)
- If the affected unit is a W Corp. employee., deal +5% damage for every value instead (max 30%)
- Turn End: this effect expires

PhotoElectricity.name: Photoelectricity
PhotoElectricity.desc:
Max Value: 3
When this unit is hit, the Attacker gains Charge Count equal to the value (once per Skill)
- If the Attacker has 5- Charge Count, they gain +3 additional Charge Count
Turn End: this effect expires

Coffin.name: Coffin
Coffin.desc:
- Max Value: 10
- At Turn End:
  - Gain 2 Damage Up next turn for every 3 Value (max 6)
  - Raise minimum Speed by 1 next turn for every 4 Value (max 2)
  - Gain 1 Clash Power Up next turn for every 5 Value (max 2)

WildHunt.name: Wild Hunt
WildHunt.desc:
- In the same turn this unit gained Wild Hunt for the first time, always have 1 remaining HP; "revive"(heal 50% HP and reset SP to 0) this unit at Turn End.
- On death, gain 1 E.G.O resource for the least-owned E.G.O resource
- If this unit is killed by an attack, inflict 3 Sinking against the last attacker
- Dies at the end of the same turn this unit was revived in

NightPathfinding.name: Dullahan
NightPathfinding.desc:
- Max Value: 3
- Gain 3 Offense Level
- Lose 3 Defense Level
- Raise Min & Max Speed values by 1
- Turn End: Gain 1 Dullahan next turn (At -25 SP or less, however, completely lose Dullahan)
- Turn End: If this unit has Dullahan, lose (15 - (Coffin/2)) SP. (min 10)

WanderingFootsteps.name: Impending Ruin
WanderingFootsteps.desc:
- Units with SP: change their Panic Type to ""Ruin"".
(Ruin: When this unit enters Low Morale state, gain 3 Sinking at every Turn End and lose 1 Clash Power. When this unit Panics, gain 5 Sinking and 3 Sinking Count at every Turn End and lose 2 Clash Power)
- Units without SP: -10% chance to flip Heads
- Reduced by 1 at Turn End
- This effect is not cumulative; inflicting it will replace the current value with the inflicted value.
※ Apply the ""Units without SP"" conditional to certain enemies that have SP but can't change their Panic Types.

DevyatDimensionalSack.name: Courier Trunk - Rodion
DevyatDimensionalSack.desc:
- Base Value: 0
- Turn Start: gain 3 Stack
- Stack does not expire upon Retreat; it is stored instead

- At 20+ Stack: Gain 1 Clash Power Up and 1 Slash Damage Up
- At 30+ Stack:
· On Skill Use, take (Stack/3)% HP damage and (Stack/3) SP damage
· On Turn End, take (Stack/2)% HP damage and (Stack/2) SP damage (applies before Retreat)

Retreat.name: Strategic R&R Mode
Retreat.desc:
- Turn End: recover from Stagger and Retreat from the Encounter (unless it's a forced Stagger; does not count as death)
· In Chain Battles, give this unit's Slots to a Substituted unit and move to the rearmost place in the Backup units' Deployment order (escape from the Encounter entirely if there are no other Backup Units remaining to swap places with next turn. When returning to battle, return in the order they retreated in)
· When returning to battle, return with the same amount of HP and SP this unit had when it retreated, and eliminate all effects on self save for a select few (if this unit had less than 0 SP when retreating, reset SP to 0 instead)

DefensiveStance.name: Defensive Stance
DefensiveStance.desc:
- Max Value: 2
- This effect does not compound in potency; stacking it only extends its duration.
- Reduced by 1 at Turn End
- When a unit gains this effect, gain the following effects next turn:
  · Fix this unit's Speed to its minimum value
  · Gain 5 Defense Level Up
  · Each of this unit's Slots gain +(10 / this unit's # of Slots) Aggro
  · When chaining Skills, this unit can draw enemies' attack toward this unit regardless of Speed (Focused Encounters only)
  · Upon Clash Win, trigger Tremor Burst
  · Cannot be Staggered by damage

CanDuelGuard.name: Clashable Guard
CanDuelGuard.desc:
- On Clash Win: raise the target's Stagger Threshold by this unit's final Clash Power.
- On Clash Lose: when hit, reduce the attacker's final Skill Power by this unit's Final Power.
- On Clash Lose: does not gain Final Power from the following sources: Resonance and the Level disparity against the Attack Skill

SuperCoin.name: Unbreakable Coin
SuperCoin.desc:
- This coin does not break upon Clash Lose.
- If an Attack Skill has this Coin, attack with this Coin after getting hit.
- Upon Clash Lose, fix the Coin Power of the unbroken Coin to 1

BloodScissorPersonalityFirst.name: Blood-tinged Scissorblades
BloodScissorPersonalityFirst.desc:
- Max Value: 10
- Stage 1 Blood-tinged Scissorblades
- At 10+ Blood-tinged Scissorblades, converts to Blood-tinged Scissorblades II.
- At 20+ Blood-tinged Scissorblades, converts to Blood-tinged Scissorblades III.
- Reverts to previous Stage when the Stack drops below the requirements.
- Blood-tinged Scissorblades does not drop below 1.
- At Blood-tinged Scissorblades II, gain 1 Offense Level Up and 1 Defense Level Down based on the Stack
- At Blood-tinged Scissorblades III, gain 1 Offense Level Up based on the Stack

LineCuttingPersonality.name: Sewing Target
LineCuttingPersonality.desc:
- Max Value: 1
- Take +0.5% damage for every Bleed on self (max 10%)
- Turn End: reduced by 1

BloodyHandGregFirst.name: Bloodied Hand
BloodyHandGregFirst.desc:
- Max Value: 10
- Stage 1 Bloodied Hand
- At 10+ Bloodied Hand, converts to Bloodied Hand II.
- At 20+ Bloodied Hand, converts to Bloodied Hand III.
- Reverts to previous Stage when the Stack drops below the requirements.
- At Bloodied Hand II, gain 1 Offense Level Up based on the Stack
- At Bloodied Hand III, gain 1 Offense Level Up based on the Stack, and additionally inflict 1 Rupture and 1 Bleed On Hit with Base Skills

WornHeartGreg.name: Ailing Heart
WornHeartGreg.desc:
- Max Value: 10

BloomingThornsRodionFirst.name: Blooming Thorn

- [The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion Only]
· At max Stack, convert to the next Stage of this effect.
· Inflict +(Stage - 1) more Bleed and Rupture Potency with this unit's Base Attack Skill Coin effects.
· Reverts to previous Stage when the Stack drops below the requirements.

FestivalFeverRodion.name: Festive Fever
FestivalFeverRodion.desc:

DevyatDimensionalSackSinclair.name: Courier Trunk - Sinclair

SwirlingBloodPersonality.name: Shimmering【Bloodfiend】

BloodArmorPersonalityFirst.name: Hardblood
BloodArmorPersonalityFirst.desc:
- Max Stack: 10

- At 20+ Hardblood, converts to Hardblood III.
- Reverts to the previous Stage when the Stack drops below the requirements.
- Hardblood does not drop below 1.

- At Hardblood II, gain 1 Offense Level Up based on the Stack
- At Hardblood III, gain 1 Offense Level Up and 1 Defense Level Up based on the Stack

SadLamanchaland.name: Responsibility

- Max Value: 1
- Clash Power +1
- Deal +20% damage
- Take +20% damage

CoveringFire.name: Target Spotted

If unit A applies this effect to unit B: Unit B follows up with an Unopposed Attack with its Skill 2 against the same enemy Unit A attacked with its Skill. Activates at Unit A's Attack End.
- The Skill used due to this effect does not affect Unit B's upcoming Skills list.

Unique Ammo
Atelier Logic Workshop Special Ammo

GlowingLantern.name: Fairy Lure

AimForTheGoal.name: Target Aim
AimForTheGoal.desc:
- Max Stack: 4
- Expires if this unit does not have "Ready to Loose"

SnipingArrowMode.name: Ready to Loose
SnipingArrowMode.desc:
- When this unit has this effect, activate the following:
· Converts the leftmost Base Attack Skill on the Dashboard to "Bow's Glimmer", then uses it at Combat Start
· This unit cannot be Staggered from taking damage, Tremor Burst, or raised Stagger Threshold
· Does not trigger <noparse>Assist Attack</noparse>
· Removed if an E.G.O Skill was equipped at Combat Start

AStrokeOfDeath.name: Liferender
AStrokeOfDeath.desc:
- Offense Level +2
- Final Power +1
- Expires at Turn End

WOverCharge.name: Overcharge
WOverCharge.desc:
- Max Value : 1
- Become Immobilized
- Take 10 + (Charge Potency on self x 5)% less damage (max 25%)
- Turn Start: Gain Charge Barrier based on Charge Potency on self (max 5)
- Turn End: Gain +10 Charge Count and 2 Attack Power Up next turn, and lose this effect
- Gain Aggro to this unit's leftmost Slot based on Charge Potency on self (max 5)
- When hit, gain +1 Charge Count and 1 Load next turn (max 5 per turn)
- If this unit is in Panic or in E.G.O Corrosion at Turn Start, or if this unit is Staggered, lose this effect

BloodArmorMeursault.name: Hardblood Armor
BloodArmorMeursault.desc:
- Max Stack: 5
- If this unit isn't at max HP: after its Skill attack, heal 10% of HP damage dealt (once per turn; max 40 healing)
- After Attack: if this unit dealt HP damage, lose 1 Stack (once per turn)
• If Lust Reson. was activated, halve the amount of HP healed, but do not lose any Hardblood Armor Stack

FocusOnActing.name: Focused Performance
FocusOnActing.desc:
- Max Stack: 3
- <La Manchaland> Identities only; includes Empowered Skills
- Skill 1 and Skill 2 gain Final Power +1; deal +5% damage for every Stack (max 15%)
- Skill 3 gains Final Power +2; deals +10% damage for every Stack (max 30%)
- Lose 1 Stack when:
  1) After attacking with Skill 3
  2) If this unit does not have Hardblood Armor at Turn Start

ParadeConcentration.name: La Mancha Parade
ParadeConcentration.desc:
- Max Stack: 4
- Take +10% damage from Lust Skills
• If the target is a <La Manchaland> Identity, take +20% damage regardless of the Skill's Affinity
• At max Stack, deal -20% damage against <La Manchaland> Identities
- Lose 1 Stack either after this unit's Skill hits and ends or after the Skill that attacked this unit hits and ends

HanafudaOne.name: Hand - Pine Crane Suit
HanafudaOne.desc:
- Skill 1 Base Power +2
- When this unit equips and uses a <color=#ff0000>Wrath</color> Base Attack Skill or E.G.O Skill on its leftmost Skill Slot, activate the "forming a Hand" effects on the "Koi-Koi" Passive

HanafudaTwo.name: Hand - Susuki Grass Suit
HanafudaTwo.desc:
- Skill 2 Base Power +1
- When this unit equips and uses a <color=#fbc82b>Sloth</color> Base Attack Skill or E.G.O Skill on its leftmost Skill Slot, activate the "forming a Hand" effects on the "Koi-Koi" Passive

HanafudaThree.name: Hand - Blue Sakura Suit
HanafudaThree.desc:
- Skill 3 Base Power +1
- When this unit equips and uses a <color=#15c3ee>Gloom</color> Base Attack Skill or E.G.O Skill on its leftmost Skill Slot, activate the "forming a Hand" effects on the "Koi-Koi" Passive

HanafudaCombo.name: Bright【光】
HanafudaCombo.desc:
- Potency : Base 0, Max 5
- Count : Base 3, Max 3

- Turn Start: gain 1 Offense Level Up for every Potency
- Turn Start: lose 1 Stack

HurtNightStiletto.name: Open Wound
HurtNightStiletto.desc:
- Max Stack: 2
- Turn End: Gain 1 Bind next turn
- Turn End: At 2 Stack, replace this effect with Deep Wound next turn

CriHurtNightStiletto.name: Deep Wound
CriHurtNightStiletto.desc:
- Base Stack: 3
- On Tremor Burst, gain +1 Bleed Count (2 times per turn)
- Cannot gain Open Wound (in Focused Encounters, the Part)
- Turn End: Gain (Stack - 1) Bind next turn
- Turn End: Reduce Stack by 1

HorrHurtNightStiletto.name: Fatal Wound
HorrHurtNightStiletto.desc:
- Base Stack: 3
- On Tremor Burst, gain +3 Bleed Count (2 times per turn)
- Cannot gain Open Wound (in Focused Encounters, the Part)
- Turn End: Gain Bind equal to Stack next turn
- Turn End: Reduce Stack by 1

GrownHorns.name: Burgeoning of Horns [發角]
GrownHorns.desc:
- Max value: 3
- This unit's Base Skills inflict +1 more of Rupture and Sinking Potency
- Turn End: Lose 1 Stack

CrushMarks.name: Shattermark
CrushMarks.desc:
- Take +10% damage from Gluttony and Gloom Skills
- Units with SP: change their Panic Type to "Shattermark"
- Units without SP: Clash Power -1
- Turn End: Reduce 1 Stack
- This effect is not cumulative; inflicting it will replace the current value with the inflicted value
- Apply the "Units without SP" conditional to certain enemies that have SP but can't change their Panic Types

※ Shattermark Panic-type Effects
- Low Morale: Clash Power -1, Defense Level -2 on self
- Panic: Clash Power -2, Defense Level -3 on self

ChickenFightlust.name: Battleblood Instinct
ChickenFightlust.desc:
- Max Stack: 20
- For every Stack, deal +0.75% damage
- For every 10 Stack, gain 1 Haste next turn

ProtectStanceRyoshu.name: Protector's Stance
ProtectStanceRyoshu.desc:
- Max Stack: 2
- Take (Stack x 10)% less damage
- Turn Start: Gain Shield by Poise on self (max 20)
- Turn End: Gain 3 Poise Potency and +1 Poise Count; this unit's leftmost Skill Slot gains +5 Aggro next turn
- Turn End: Lose 1 Stack

TheUdjatOutis.name: The Udjat [Vanguard]
TheUdjatOutis.desc:
- Max Stack: 2
- Min & Max Speed +3
- Combat Start: gain 1 Protection
- Gain the following effects during the Combat Phase (once per Skill, 3 times per turn)
· When this unit is the main target of an Unopposed Attack Skill, halve the chance for the Skill's first Coin to flip Heads
· Clash Start: In the first Clash, halve the target's chance to flip Heads for all of its Coins
· For both of the above effects, if the target uses Minus Coins, halve their chance to flip Tails instead
- Turn End: Reduce 1 Stack

BlueSand.name: Blue Sand
BlueSand.desc:
- On Clash Lose, gain +1 Sinking Count (3 times per turn)
- Units with SP: change their Panic Type to "Blue Sand"
- Units without SP: Min & Max Speed -1
- Turn End: Reduce 1 Stack
- This effect is not cumulative; inflicting it will replace the current value with the inflicted value
- Apply the "Units without SP" conditional to certain enemies that have SP but can't change their Panic Types

※ Blue Sand Panic Effects
- Low Morale: Clash Power -1, Min & Max Speed -1
- Panic: Clash Power -2, Min & Max Speed -1

SheutFracture.name: Sheut Fracture
SheutFracture.desc:
- Max Stack: 10
- Unique Sinking
- For every Stack, take +1% more damage from Sloth and Gloom Skills
- At max Stack, gain 1 Gloom Fragility (once per turn), take Gloom damage equal to Sinking Potency on self(lose 1 Sinking Count), then expires
- If the unit with this effect dies, transfer half of its Stack to its ally with the highest SP (rounded down)
- Turn Start: If there are no LCA Identities on the field, expires

LCA_Bullet.name: LCA Fracture Round
LCA_Bullet.desc:
- Max Capacity: 16
- Unique Ammo
- Spent by certain Skills
- Some attacks cancel if lacking Ammo

ReinforcedTattooIshmael.name: The Middle Styled Augmentation Tattoos
ReinforcedTattooIshmael.desc:
- Max Stack: 10
- Final Power +1 for Base Skills for every 5 Stack (max 2)
- Envy Skills and Blunt Skills deal +5% damage for every Stack (max 50%)

ResentmentIshmael.name: The Middle - Grudge
ResentmentIshmael.desc:
- Max Stack: 15
- If target has Vengeance Mark, deal +20% damage

HeatingWireIshmael.name: Thermal Blades
HeatingWireIshmael.desc:
- Max Stack: 2
- If target hit by Base Skills has Burn, heal 3 SP (2 times per turn)
- Inflict Burn when inflicting Bleed with certain Skill Coins
- Turn End: Lose 1 Stack

LanternGregBigBird.name: Lamp
LanternGregBigBird.desc:
- Max Stack: 8
- Turn End: Gain 1 Bind next turn for every 2 Stack (max 4)
- Turn End: At max Stack, if there are enemies on the field, consume all Stack to activate the following effects next turn:
• Gain +10 Aggro to the leftmost Slot
• Inflict 3 Dazzle to the enemy(Core) with the most current HP

ObedienceGregBigBird.name: Guardians of the Forest
ObedienceGregBigBird.desc:
Before Attack, activate the following effects:
- Plus Coin Skills heal 4 SP (if already at max SP, gain 2 Offense Level Up next turn)
- Minus Coin Skills lose 8 SP (this effect cannot reduce the unit's SP below -40)
- Lose this effect

DelusionGregBigBird.name: Dazzle
DelusionGregBigBird.desc:
- For every 1 (Sinking + Burn), take +0.5% damage from Base Attack Skills (max 10%)
- Units with SP: Change their Panic Type to "Dazzle"
- Units without SP: Defense Level -2
- Turn End: Lose 1 Stack
- This effect is not cumulative; inflicting it will replace the current value with the inflicted value
- Apply the "Units without SP" conditional to certain enemies that have SP but can't change their Panic Types

※ Dazzle Panic-type Effects
- Low Morale: Turn End: Gain 1 Bind and 2 Offense Level Down next turn
- Panic: Turn End: Gain 1 Bind and 4 Offense Level Down next turn

LittleFingerID.name: Moonlit Azure Blade
LittleFingerID.desc:
- Max Stack: 20
- Turn Start: Gain 2 Shield for every Stack
- Deal +1% damage on Critical Hit for every Stack

IndexPrescriptYi_0.name: Prescript: [Device] I
IndexPrescriptYi_0.desc:
Use a Skill marked with Mark of the Prescript or hit a target with a marked Skill.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect when this unit has no Unlock
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 3

IndexPrescriptYi_1.name: Prescript: [Device] II
IndexPrescriptYi_1.desc:
Hit a target with a Skill marked with Mark of the Prescript.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect if this unit has Unlock - I
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 6

IndexPrescriptYi_2.name: Prescript: [Device] III
IndexPrescriptYi_2.desc:
Gain Procuration [Hermes]. Repeat this Prescript until Procuration [Hermes] reaches 9 Stacks.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect if this unit has Unlock - II
- Maximum stackable Grace of the Prescript with this Prescript is limited to 9

IndexPrescriptYi_3.name: Prescript: [Device] IV
IndexPrescriptYi_3.desc:
Eliminate all enemies before the next Prescript arrives.

- Turn Start: Gain this effect if this unit has Unlock - III

StackYisangSpecialSkill.name: Procuration [Hermes]
StackYisangSpecialSkill.desc:
- Turn Start: At 9 Stack, a powerful Skill becomes available
- Can be gained up to (Unlock stage + 2) Stack per turn
- Max Stack: 9
· At below Unlock - II, this effect's maximum Stack is limited to 8

Shin_IndexFingerYisang.name: Shin (心) - Fate
Shin_IndexFingerYisang.desc:
- Min & Max Speed +1
- Gain +1 more Poise Potency and Count from Base Skills
- If this unit's SP is higher than the target's, deal +1% damage for every 3 SP difference (max 15%; units without SP are considered to be at 0 SP)

BurningWoundYisangMask.name: Wound-casing Mask
BurningWoundYisangMask.desc:
- Offense Level +2, Defense Level -2
- Take -10% damage from Unopposed Attacks

BurningWoundYisang.name: Sizzling Wound
BurningWoundYisang.desc:
- Offense Level +3, Defense Level -3
- Take -25% damage from Unopposed Attacks
- Turn Start: Gain 1 Burn and 1 Bleed
- Deal +15% damage with Base Attack Skill's Unbreakable Coins

BlackNightmareYisang.name: Indulgence in Prescripts
BlackNightmareYisang.desc:
- Min & Max Speed +5
- Apply the following effects to 'Furioso-Replica':
· On Hit, inflict +1 more Sinking Potency and gain +1 more Poise Potency
· On Hit, inflict +3 Sinking Count (once per target)
· Deal +30% damage
- Expires at Turn End

YisangWeapon01Hatchet.name: When hacking through the ribs with a hatchet...
YisangWeapon01Hatchet.desc:
- This Coin deals Blunt damage
- On Hit without Cracking, gain 2 Poise

YisangWeapon02Stiletto.name: When penetrating the lungs with a stiletto...
YisangWeapon02Stiletto.desc:
- This Coin deals Pierce damage
- On Hit without Cracking, inflict 2 Sinking

YisangWeapon03Greatsword.name: When cleaving through the shoulder and the skull with a bastard sword...
YisangWeapon03Greatsword.desc:
- This Coin deals Slash damage
- This Coin deals +5% damage
- On Hit without Cracking, gain 1 Offense Level Up next turn (2 times per turn)

YisangWeapon04Rapier.name: When punching 10 or more holes in the torso with a rapier...
YisangWeapon04Rapier.desc:
- This Coin deals Pierce damage
- This Coin deals +5% damage
- On Hit without Cracking, inflict 1 Defense Level Down next turn (2 times per turn)

YisangWeapon05Sledgehammer.name: When caving in the back of the skull with a hammer...
YisangWeapon05Sledgehammer.desc:
- This Coin deals Blunt damage
- This Coin deals +5% damage
- On Hit without Cracking, raise target's Stagger Threshold by 3

YisangWeapon06Ultragreatsword.name: When rending the body with a great sword...
YisangWeapon06Ultragreatsword.desc:
- This Coin deals Slash damage
- This Coin deals +15% damage
- On Hit without Cracking, inflict 1 Slash Fragility until next turn (2 times per turn)

YisangWeapon07Lance.name: When boring a 20-inch hole with a lance...
YisangWeapon07Lance.desc:
- This Coin deals Pierce damage
- This Coin deals +15% damage
- On Hit without Cracking, inflict 1 Pierce Fragility until next turn (2 times per turn)

YisangWeapon08Chain.name: When ripping the flesh to ten thousand strips with a whip...
YisangWeapon08Chain.desc:
- This Coin deals Blunt damage
- This Coin deals +15% damage
- On Hit without Cracking, inflict 1 Blunt Fragility until next turn (2 times per turn)

YisangWeapon09Scythe.name: When lacerating through space itself with a scythe, like a certain someone...
YisangWeapon09Scythe.desc:
- This Coin deals Slash damage
- This Coin deals +30% damage
- On Hit without Cracking, it hits a guaranteed Crit

SatisfyingEsteemNeeds.name: Desire for Acknowledgement Sated
SatisfyingEsteemNeeds.desc:
- Deal +7.5% damage with Skills marked with Mark of the Prescript
- Deal +7.5% damage against The Prescript's Targets

BloodDinner.name: Bloodfeast
BloodDinner.desc:
- Max Value: 999
- Stores all Bleed damage dealt in this zone
- Resets when moving to a different zone
- This value is shared by all characters
- If there is a higher Kindred among the allies who also consumes Bloodfeast, this unit cannot consume Bloodfeast until that ally consumes it first.

BloodDinner_Accumulation.name: Bloodfeast Consumed
BloodDinner_Accumulation.desc:
- Max Value: 999
- Displays the total amount of Bloodfeast consumed in this Encounter

ConcentratedAttackMeursault.name: Focused Attack - Meursault
ConcentratedAttackMeursault.desc:
<Focused Encounters Only>
The unit that inflicted this Focused Attack gains the following effects based on the target Slot's Focused Attack Stack.
  · 1x Stack: Gain Clash Power +1
  · 2x Stack: Gain Base Power +1
  · 3x Stack: Gain Base Power +1 and Coin Power +1
- Expires if, for a turn, the unit that inflicted it fails to hit the Slot inflicted with their Focused Attack.
- Expires if the unit that inflicted Focused Attack inflicts it on a different Slot.
- Replaced if a different unit inflicts Focused Attack on a Slot already inflicted with Focused Attack.
- At the start of the next turn, if a Slot inflicted with Focused Attack is no longer present, rearrange all Focused Attacks inflicted against the Slots of that Part in the order of Deployment

HystericGauge.name: Hysteria
HystericGauge.desc:
- Base Stack: 0
- Max Stack: 3
- At Turn End...
· At 0 or higher SP, lose 1 Stack
· At less than 0 SP, gain 1 Stack

MagicalGirlAppear.name: Here Comes Magical Girl!
MagicalGirlAppear.desc:
- For this turn, this unit uses Plus Coin Base Attack Skills

- Base Attack Skills deal +3% damage for every Love/Hate on self (max 15%)

NoVillain.name: Regressive Transformation - Reversed
NoVillain.desc: - For this turn, this unit uses Minus Coin Base Attack Skills

VillainMark.name: Mark of Villainy
VillainMark.desc:
- Take +10% damage from Don Quixote

- Applies only to the first target to receive the effect in each turn

ArcanaQueenOfHate.name: Magical Arcana
ArcanaQueenOfHate.desc:
- Max Stack: 3
- Base Attack Skills deal +(Stack x 5)% damage
- Turn End: At 3 Stack and with -25 or higher SP, change SP to -25

ThePowerOfLoveAndHate.name: Love/Hate
ThePowerOfLoveAndHate.desc:
- Max Count: 20
- Unique Charge
- Resource used by certain skills for additional effects. Its Count can go up to 20. Count lowers by 1 at the end of each turn.
(Interacts the same way as normal Charge does to effects that raise or reduce Charge Potency/Count)

BlessingAlly.name: Blessing
BlessingAlly.desc:
- Turn Start: gain 1 Protecting Sword for every 8 SP (max 5)
- When Clash ends, inflict 2 Sinking (once per turn)
- When hit, inflict 2 Sinking on the attacker (once per turn)
- For every 20 SP, inflict +1 more Sinking Potency with above effects (max 2)
- Replace this unit's Base Skills with Plus Coin Skills

ProtectiveSword.name: Protecting Sword
ProtectiveSword.desc:
- Turn Start: gain 1 Defense Level Up for every Stack (max 5)
- Turn Start: +(Stack x 3) Aggro to the leftmost Skill Slot on the Dashboard (max 15)
- Max Stack: 5
- Expires at Turn End

DespairAlly.name: Despair
DespairAlly.desc:
- Turn Start: gain 1 Piercing Sword for every -8 SP (max 5)
- When Clash ends, inflict +1 Sinking Count (once per turn)
- On Hit with the first Coin of a Base Attack Skill, inflict +1 Sinking Count (once per turn)
- For every -20 SP, inflict +1 more Sinking Count with above effects (max 2)
- Replace this unit's Base Skills with Minus Coin Skills

PenetratingSword.name: Piercing Sword
PenetratingSword.desc:
- Turn Start: gain 1 Offense Level Up for every Stack (max 5)
- Turn Start: -(Stack x 0.15) Aggro to all Skill Slots on the Dashboard (max 0.75)
- Max Stack: 5
- Expires at Turn End

SwordCutwithTear.name: Tear-sharpened
SwordCutwithTear.desc:
- Turn Start: gain 5 Deep Tears
· At 3 Stack, gain additional 5 Deep Tears
- Turn End: lose (Stack x 15) SP
- Base Attack Skills deal +(Stack x 10)% damage (max 30%)
- If this unit has Blessing, gain Clash Power Up by the effect's Stack at Turn Start
- If this unit has Despair, gain Pierce Power Up by the effect's Stack at Turn Start
- Max Stack: 3

BlackTearsAlly.name: Deep Tears
BlackTearsAlly.desc:
- Unique Charge (fixed Potency)
- Resource used by certain skills for additional effects
- Max Stack: 20

ScarletDamageUp.name: Lust DMG Up
ScarletDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Lust skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

Curse.name: Curse
Curse.desc:
Turn End: Next turn, randomly gain one of the following, then reduce this effect’s Count by 1.
1 Attack Power Down/1 Defense Power Down/2 Offense Level Down/2 Defense Level Down.

VibrationSpring.name: Tremor - Clockwinding
VibrationSpring.desc:
- Max Speed + 2
- Consume Tremor Count on self to inflict 1 more of Tremor Potency or Count when inflicting them with this unit's Skill or Coin effects
- When hit by Skills that trigger Tremor Burst, raise the Stagger Threshold by the effect's Potency
- Turn End: reduce the Count by 1
- (Interacts the same way as normal Tremor does to effects that raise or reduce Tremor Potency/Count)

Operation.name: Surgery
Operation.desc:
Die when Count reaches 5.
Reduce Max HP by 20% (per Count).
Deal 20% (per Count) more damage.
At the start of the turn, gain Haste by the effect’s Count.

FreishutzOutisEgoBullet_5th.name: The Fifth Magic Bullet
FreishutzOutisEgoBullet_5th.desc:
- Deal +30% damage
- Before Attack: gain +4 Atk Weight
- On Hit, inflict 10 Burn; then, inflict 4 Offense Level down and 4 Defense Level Down next turn

NiddleEGO.name: Needle
NiddleEGO.desc:
- Unique Bleed
- When taking Envy damage, gain +1 Bleed Count and reduce this effect's Stack by 1
- Turn End: Gain 1 Bleed and reduce this effect's Stack by 1

CrimsonResultUp.name: Wrath Power Up
CrimsonResultUp.desc: Wrath skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

AmberResultUp.name: Sloth Power Up
AmberResultUp.desc: Sloth skills gain final Power by the effect’s Count for one turn.

MentalSystemResultDecrease_Typo.name: SP Loss Efficiency
MentalSystemResultDecrease_Typo.desc: Amount of SP lost due to the Identity's 'Base factors decreasing Sanity(SP)'

ForwardToTheBoundKing.name: Before the King in Binds
ForwardToTheBoundKing.desc: When this unit's attack with 1 Atk Weight hits, inflict 100% of the resulting Coin value On Hit as (Affinity/Attack Type of the Attack Skill used to hit) damage against 2 other attackable enemies with the least HP

VibrationCrack.name: Tremor - Fracture
VibrationCrack.desc:
- When Staggered, and when the sum of Tremor Potency and Count adds up to 20 or higher, raise Stagger Level by 1
- Cannot exceed maximum Stagger Level with this effect

When hit by attacks that trigger Tremor Burst, raise the Stagger Threshold by the effect's Potency
Turn End: reduce the Count by 1
(Interacts the same way as normal Tremor does to effects that raises or reduces Tremor Potency/Count)

Muckworm.name: Maggots
Muckworm.desc: Turn End: Take Gluttony damage by the Count, then lower it by 1; Bleed Count +1.

AmberTakeDamageDown.name: Sloth Protection
AmberTakeDamageDown.desc: Take less damage from Sloth skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

RoseWedge.name: Rose Wedge
RoseWedge.desc:
- Max Potency: 10
- Max Count: 4
- Gain 1 Potency every time this unit takes 10 Bleed damage
- When gaining Bleed or 'Unique Bleed' from getting hit, gain 2 Bleed and inflict 1 Bleed against the Attacker. (5 times per turn)
· At 10 Potency, gain +1 Bleed Count as well when triggering the above effect.
- Turn End: lose 1 Count
- Combat End: at 10 Potency or 1 Count, this effect expires, and this unit takes (Potency x 10) Lust damage.
- If the unit inflicted with this effect dies, or when this effect expires: increase Bloodfeast by (Potency x 10), and deal (Potency x 2) Lust damage against all of its allies (min 1)

AmberDamageUp.name: Sloth DMG Up
AmberDamageUp.desc: Deal more damage with Sloth skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

CentipedePoison.name: Centipede Venom
CentipedePoison.desc:
- Max Stack: 20
- Turn End: gain (Stack / 4) Defense Level Down next turn (rounded down)
- Turn End: take Gluttony damage equal to Stack, and halve the Stack (rounded down)
Upon death, transfers to this unit's ally(for Focused Encounters, a different Part) with none or the least Centipede Venom Stacks.

NebulizerInhale.name: Nebulizer β
NebulizerInhale.desc:
- Max Stack: 5
- This effect persists throughout the Encounter
- When activating Pride A-Reson.: on Combat Start, apply 3 Poise and +3 Poise Count on self and (Stack) allies (prioritizes allies that gain or use Poise or Poise Count; among them, prioritize allies with the least Poise Potency)

ReleaseBreath.name: Shallow Exhale
ReleaseBreath.desc:
- Max Value: 1
- At 20+ Poise Potency, gain +1 Count as well whenever this unit gains Poise Potency with Skill and Coin effects
- Expires at Turn End

MlynarWaiting.name: Man in Scabbard
MlynarWaiting.desc:
- Max Stack: 40
- For every (Stack / 8), gain 1 Aggro (max 5; rounded down; affects the leftmost Skill Slot on the Dashboard)
- For every (Stack / 20), gain 1 Protection (max 2; rounded down)
- Gain 10 Stacks at Turn End
※ Can gain up to 20 per turn

HitTakeDamageDown.name: Blunt Protection
HitTakeDamageDown.desc: Take less damage from Blunt skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

CrimsonTakeDamageUp.name: Wrath Fragility
CrimsonTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Wrath skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

ShamrockTakeDamageUp.name: Gluttony Fragility
ShamrockTakeDamageUp.desc: Take more damage from Gluttony skills based on the effect’s Count for one turn. (Max 10)

FreishutzOutisEgoBullet_7th.name: The Seventh Magic Bullet
FreishutzOutisEgoBullet_7th.desc:
- Deal +200% damage
- Deal +2.5% damage for every 1% missing HP on target (max 200%)
- Before Attack: for this attack, if the Pierce Damage Res. on target or on self are less than 2.0, change them to Fatal(x2.0)
- After Attack: kills this unit

ForwardToTheKing.name: Before the King
ForwardToTheKing.desc: When this unit's attack with 1 Atk Weight hits, inflict 50% of the resulting Coin value On Hit as (Affinity/Attack Type of the Attack Skill used to hit) damage against 2 other attackable enemies with the least HP.

CuredFilm.name: Hardened Shell-Barrier
CuredFilm.desc:
- Turn Start: gain (Stack / 3) Defense Level Up (max 3; rounded down)
- Immediately before getting hit by an enemy, consume half of Hardened Shell-Barrier and gain Protection equal to the Stack consumed (once per turn, rounded up)
- Turn End: lose 3 Stack
- Max Stack: 10

ShieldManagerCryingToad.name: Blubberbubble
ShieldManagerCryingToad.desc:
- This effect counts as a 'Shield Management' effect.
- Turn End: Reduce Count by 1
- This unit does not lose Shield at Turn End as long as it has the Blubberbubble effect (unless depleted by damage or effect)
- If the Shield affected by Blubberbubble breaks due to taking damage, inflict 4 Sinking Potency/Count against the attacker. (How much of that '4' value is Potency or Count is randomly determined)
